basic_details.job_title: FACT Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for Draughtsman, Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore Limited (FACT), Schedule 'A' multi-divisional Central PSU
basic_details.post_name: Post Codes 1 to 34 - Draughtsman, Senior Draughtsman, Engineer Design, Deputy Manager Design, Senior Manager Design, Assistant General Manager Design (across Chemical, Mechanical-Piping, Electrical, Instrumentation, Civil, and Estimation disciplines)
basic_details.short_information: The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore Limited (FACT) has released the official FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment Notification 2026 on 07 May 2026 at www.fact.co.in. A total of 34 post codes across Draughtsman, Senior Draughtsman, Engineer Design, Deputy Manager, Senior Manager, and Assistant General Manager positions have been announced under the FACT FEDO Engineering Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates meeting the age criteria as of 01 May 2026 and holding the required qualifications in the respective engineering disciplines can apply online from 07 May 2026 to 21 May 2026. The offic

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified on FACT website www.fact.co.in

age_limit.age_details: Temporary Contract basis - for a term of 1 year or till completion of project, whichever is earlier; renewable at Management's discretion
age_limit.details: The relevant date to determine eligibility on experience and age is 01.05.2026. Std X certificate having date of birth shall only be considered as proof of date of birth. Relaxation in maximum age limit is permissible for reserved posts as per Government directives.

vacancy_details.Experience Required: (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 / (d) 5 years experience in Design & Drafting of PFDs, P&IDs & Process Specifications in Fertiliser/Refinery/Oil & Gas/Petrochemicals/CBG/Green Hydrogen/Green Ammonia project drawings using AutoCAD.

(a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 / (d) 5 years experience in Design & Drafting of piping drawings using AutoCAD for projects in Oil & Gas/Fertiliser/Chemical industries; experience in preparation of layouts, Key plans, Isometric drawings, bill of quantities etc. (Knowledge in 3D modeling using Cardworx plant software is desirable).

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Diploma in Electrical/Electrical and Electronics Engineering
vacancy_details.Experience Required: (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 / (d) 5 years experience in preparation of single line diagram, General arrangement drawings of substation buildings, power layout, earthing layout, lighting layout etc. using CAD software and preparation of BOQ for erection tenders.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Diploma in Instrumentation/Instrumentation & Control/Electronics & Instrumentation/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering
vacancy_details.Experience Required: (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 / (d) 5 years experience in preparation of engineering drawings using CAD software and preparation of BOQ for erection tenders.
(a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 / (d) 5 years experience in preparation of Civil general arrangement/Structural drawings of RCC or Steel Structures using CAD software.
(a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in preparation of Civil general arrangement/Structural drawings of RCC or Steel Structures using CAD software.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Degree in Chemical Engineering/Petrochemical Engineering/Chemical Technology/Petrochemical Technology/Petroleum Refining & Petrochemical Engineering/Polymer Technology
vacancy_details.Experience Required: (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in Process Design and Detailing Engineering involving preparation of PFDs, P&IDs & Process Specifications in the field of Fertiliser/Refinery/Oil & Gas/Petrochemicals/CBG/Green Hydrogen/Green Ammonia projects. Hands on experience in process simulation and/or design software will be an added advantage.

(a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in developing piping layouts, equipment layouts, piping isometrics, material take-offs (MTO), and preparing technical procurement specifications for piping materials. Experience in ASME Code B31.3 is desirable; knowledge of AutoCAD preferred.

(a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in design consultancy/EPCs in basic Engineering of Machinery such as pumps, compressors etc. Proficient in finalization of Procurement specifications, tender documents, BOQ and review of vendor documents/drawings.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Degree in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering
vacancy_details.Experience Required: (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in an engineering consultancy firm in designing EHV/HV power distribution system, sizing calculations, earthing system, lightning protection, lighting, BOQ for erection contract, procurement specifications, vendor drawing review. Basic knowledge in drawing SLD, power and earthing layout in AutoCAD required.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Degree in Instrumentation/Instrumentation & Control/Electronics & Instrumentation/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering
vacancy_details.Experience Required: (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in an engineering consultancy or EPC firm in design of instrumentation systems including field instruments, control system, automation projects; BOQ for erection contract, procurement specifications and vendor drawing review.

(a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in Structural Design of RCC/Steel structures. Post-graduation in Structural Design is desirable. Proficient in STAAD-Pro or ETABS Software and Indian Design Codes.
(a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in Quantity Estimation/Measurements & Billing/Specification Preparation/Rate Analysis for Civil and RCC works.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Degree in Chemical Engineering/Petrochemical Engineering/Chemical Technology/Petrochemical Technology/Petroleum Refining & Petrochemical Engineering/Polymer Technology
vacancy_details.Experience Required: Minimum 5 years experience in Process Design and Detailing Engineering involving preparation of PFDs, P&IDs & Process Specifications in the field of Fertiliser/Refinery/Oil & Gas/Petrochemicals/CBG/Green Hydrogen/Green Ammonia projects. Hands on experience in process simulation and/or design software will be an added advantage.

Minimum 5 years experience in developing piping layouts, equipment layouts, piping isometrics, MTO, and preparing technical procurement specifications for piping materials. Experience in ASME Code B31.3 is desirable; knowledge of AutoCAD preferred.

Minimum 5 years experience in design consultancy or EPC environment in design of static equipment such as Pressure Vessels, Storage Tanks, Heat Exchangers. Experience in ASME Sec VIII, API 650/620, TEMA codes is desirable. Proficiency in PV Elite, AME Tank and related tools required.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Degree in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering
vacancy_details.Experience Required: Minimum 5 years experience in an engineering consultancy firm in designing EHV/HV power distribution system, sizing calculations, earthing system, lightning protection, lighting, BOQ, procurement specifications, vendor drawing review. Basic knowledge in drawing SLD, power and earthing layout in AutoCAD required.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Degree in Instrumentation/Instrumentation & Control/Electronics & Instrumentation/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering
vacancy_details.Experience Required: Minimum 5 years experience in an engineering consultancy or EPC firm in design of instrumentation systems including field instruments, control system, automation projects; BOQ, procurement specifications and vendor drawing review.
Minimum 5 years experience in Structural Design of RCC/Steel structures. Post-graduation in Structural Design is desirable. Proficient in STAAD-Pro or ETABS Software and Indian Design Codes.
Minimum 5 years experience in Quantity Estimation/Measurements & Billing/Specification Preparation/Rate Analysis for Civil and RCC works.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Degree in Chemical Engineering/Petrochemical Engineering/Chemical Technology/Petrochemical Technology/Petroleum Refining & Petrochemical Engineering/Polymer Technology
vacancy_details.Experience Required: (a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in Process Design and Detailing Engineering involving preparation of PFDs, P&IDs & Process Specifications in the field of Fertiliser/Refinery/Oil & Gas/Petrochemicals/CBG/Green Hydrogen/Green Ammonia projects. Hands on experience in process simulation and/or design software will be an added advantage.

(a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in developing piping layouts, equipment layouts, piping isometrics, MTO, and preparing technical procurement specifications for piping materials. Experience in ASME Code B31.3 is desirable; knowledge of AutoCAD preferred.

(a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in design consultancy/EPCs in basic Engineering of Machinery such as pumps, compressors etc. Proficient in finalization of Procurement specifications, tender documents, BOQ and review of vendor documents/drawings.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Degree in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering
vacancy_details.Experience Required: (a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in an engineering consultancy firm in designing EHV/HV power distribution system, sizing calculations, earthing system, lightning protection, lighting, BOQ, procurement specifications, vendor drawing review. Basic knowledge in drawing SLD, power and earthing layout in AutoCAD required.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Degree in Instrumentation/Instrumentation & Control/Electronics & Instrumentation/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering
vacancy_details.Experience Required: (a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in an engineering consultancy or EPC firm in design of instrumentation systems including field instruments, control system, automation projects; BOQ, procurement specifications and vendor drawing review.
(a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in Structural Design of RCC/Steel structures. Post-graduation in Structural Design is desirable. Proficient in STAAD-Pro or ETABS Software and Indian Design Codes.
(a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in Quantity Estimation/Measurements & Billing/Specification Preparation/Rate Analysis for Civil and RCC works.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Degree in Chemical Engineering/Petrochemical Engineering/Chemical Technology/Petrochemical Technology/Petroleum Refining & Petrochemical Engineering/Polymer Technology
vacancy_details.Experience Required: (a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in Process Design and Detailing Engineering involving preparation of PFDs, P&IDs & Process Specifications in the field of Fertiliser/Refinery/Oil & Gas/Petrochemicals/CBG/Green Hydrogen/Green Ammonia projects. Hands on experience in process simulation and/or design software will be an added advantage.

(a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in developing piping layouts, equipment layouts, piping isometrics, MTO, and preparing technical procurement specifications for piping materials. Experience in ASME Code B31.3 is desirable; knowledge of AutoCAD preferred.

(a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in design consultancy/EPCs in basic Engineering of Machinery such as pumps, compressors etc. Proficient in finalization of Procurement specifications, tender documents, BOQ and review of vendor documents/drawings.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Degree in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering
vacancy_details.Experience Required: (a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in an engineering consultancy or EPC firm in designing EHV/HV power distribution system, sizing calculations, earthing system, lightning protection, lighting, BOQ approvals, procurement specifications, vendor drawing review.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: Degree in Instrumentation/Instrumentation & Control/Electronics & Instrumentation/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering
vacancy_details.Experience Required: (a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in an engineering consultancy or EPC firm in design of instrumentation systems including field instruments, control system, automation projects; BOQ, procurement specifications and vendor drawing review.
(a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in Structural Design of RCC/Steel structures. Post-graduation in Structural Design is desirable. Proficient in STAAD-Pro or ETABS Software and Indian Design Codes.
(a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in Quantity Estimation/Measurements & Billing/Specification Preparation/Rate Analysis for Civil and RCC works.

salary_details.details: The remuneration for the posts will be on consolidated basis as detailed below. Payment of higher consolidated pay will be considered for those with higher relevant experience, at a rate of 3% for each completed year of additional relevant experience over and above the minimum experience given under 'Specification' of each Post, subject to the maximum consolidated pay indicated. An annual increase of 3% on applicable consolidated pay will be paid, subject to renewal of contract engagement.

selection_process: Post Codes Mode of Selection Details

1 to 6 (Draughtsman / Senior Draughtsman) Skill Test in Engineering Drafting Software Candidates successful in the practical/skill test will be assessed and ranked on basis of marks scored. Tie-breaking criteria (in order): (a) Completed years of relevant experience; (b) Earlier year of passing the relevant qualification (Diploma certificate); (c) Earlier date of birth.
7 to 34 (Engineer / Deputy Manager / Senior Manager / AGM) Interview Selection will be based on marks scored in the Interview.
The decision of the Management about the mode of selection

shortlisting of candidates etc. shall be final and binding. No correspondence will be entertained in this regard. Meeting the eligibility criteria or attending or being successful in skill test/interview does not by itself confer any right on the candidate for selection or inclusion in the Panel.
how_to_apply: Candidates must complete a two-step application process. Step 1: Submit Online Form and upload Application Form (in prescribed format available on website along with notification - printed, manually filled, signed, photo affixed and uploaded in PDF format) on or before 4:00 PM on 21.05.2026 via the Online Registration link at www.fact.co.in >> Careers >> Job Openings >> Recruitment Notification 01/2026. Step 2: Send the original Application Form uploaded along with all relevant certificates/documents by Speed Post/Registered Post so as to reach FACT on or before 28.05.2026.

Candidates wishing to apply for more than one post must submit separate online applications and send separate applications with connected documents to the HR Department for each post. Envelope containing the application shall be superscribed with "Application for the post of (___) - Ad.01/2026." Application received by post without submitting Online Form, or Online Form submitted without uploading prescribed Application Form, or not receiving Application by post, or Application received late, will not be considered.
Documents to be Sent by Speed Post/Registered Post along with Original Application Form (self-attested copies):
Proof of Date of Birth - Std X certificate with date of birth or Birth Certificate
Certificates to prove educational qualification from Std X onwards - both marksheet and Pass Certificate
Certificates to prove relevant experience as mentioned in the Application Form
Certificate of Proficiency (COP) issued by Board of Apprenticeship Training, if any
Apprenticeship Training completion certificate issued by Company, if any
Certificate showing proof of Caste/EWS/PWBD, for claiming reservation/relaxation, if any
Self Declaration by OBC-NCL candidates (in prescribed format available on website)
Send by Speed Post/Registered Post to: DGM (HR), HR Department, FEDO Building, FACT, Udyogamandal, PIN – 683501 so as to reach on or before 28.05.2026.
Apply Online at: https://www.fact.co.in (Careers >> Job Openings >> Recruitment Notification 01/2026)
important_instructions: Two-step application is mandatory - both Online Form submission AND physical application by Speed Post/Registered Post are compulsory; failure of either step will result in rejection. Only full-time regular courses will be considered for prescribed educational qualifications - qualifications acquired through part-time/correspondence/distance/private study/off campus will not be considered. Only post-qualification experience will be considered for all posts. One year Apprenticeship training will also be considered as experience on production of COP issued by Board of Apprenticeship Training. Candidates may apply for one or more of the specified experience levels and must indicate their preference - only the specific experience level(s) preferred in the application will be considered. Candidates wishing to apply for more than one post must submit separate online applications and send separate applications with documents to HR for each post. Candidates shall be willing to work at Site based on project requirements. Engagement is only for fixed term against specific projects and will not confer any right for extension, permanent appointment, or preferential treatment in any future appointment. Candidates already engaged in FACT as work charged employees in a particular project shall not be considered for appointment from a new merit panel. EWS candidates shall submit EWS certificate of relevant year (income of 2025-26). OBC-NCL candidates shall submit OBC-NCL certificate and self-declaration along with application. Candidates will be required to undergo pre-employment medical examination - only those certified fit by the Company's Medical Officer will be offered appointment. No relaxation in Medical/Physical standards will be allowed. All further notifications shall be through the Company website www.fact.co.in - individual communications may not be sent; all communications will be only through the email ID used for submitting Online Form. Candidates must keep the said email ID valid and functional at all times. Any dispute with regard to recruitment against this notification will be settled in courts within the jurisdiction of Ernakulam, Kerala State only.

faq.question: Q1. What is FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026 is a temporary contract engagement drive by The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore Limited (FACT) through Notification No. 01/2026 dated 07 May 2026 for preparing a panel for Draughtsman, Senior Draughtsman, Engineer Design, Deputy Manager, Senior Manager, and Assistant General Manager posts in FACT Engineering and Design Organisation (FEDO) and other FACT/FEDO projects.

faq.question: Q2. How many post codes are notified under FACT FEDO Engineering Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 34 post codes have been notified across multiple engineering disciplines, covering Draughtsman (Chemical, Mechanical‑Piping, Electrical, Instrumentation, Civil), Senior Draughtsman (Civil), Engineer Design (Process, Piping, Mechanical, Electrical, Instrumentation, Civil, Estimation), Deputy Manager, Senior Manager and Assistant General Manager in design and estimation streams.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment notification is dated 07 May 2026, the last date for online form submission is 21 May 2026 up to 4:00 PM, and the last date for receipt of the original application form with documents by Speed Post/Registered Post at FACT is 28 May 2026; eligibility for age and experience is reckoned as on 01 May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For Draughtsman, Engineer and Deputy Manager posts (post codes 1 to 5 and 7 to 20), the maximum age is generally 35 years as on 01 May 2026, for Senior Draughtsman and Senior Manager posts (post codes 6 and 21 to 27) it is 45 years, and for Assistant General Manager posts (post codes 28 to 34) it is 50 years, with applicable relaxations for reserved categories as per Government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualification and experience requirements for FACT FEDO Engineering posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess full‑time regular Diploma or Degree in the relevant engineering discipline (Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, Instrumentation, Civil, Architecture, etc.) from a recognized institution and have the prescribed post‑qualification experience ranging from 1 to 15 years in areas like design and drafting, process design, piping, electrical and instrumentation design, structural design, and civil estimation, as detailed against each post code in the notification; one‑year apprenticeship with Certificate of Proficiency from Board of Apprenticeship Training is also counted as experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary or consolidated remuneration for FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: FACT offers consolidated pay starting around Rs. 25,750 per month for Draughtsman with 1 year experience and going up to about Rs. 53,820–67,240 per month for Assistant General Manager Design/Estimation with 15 years experience, with 3% increments for each additional completed year of relevant experience over the minimum and an annual 3% increase on renewal of the contract, subject to the maximum consolidated pay prescribed for each experience slab.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For Draughtsman and Senior Draughtsman posts (post codes 1 to 6), selection is through a skill test in engineering drafting software, while for Engineer Design, Deputy Manager, Senior Manager and Assistant General Manager posts (post codes 7 to 34), selection is based on performance in the interview; meeting eligibility or attending test/interview does not guarantee selection or empanelment.

faq.question: Q8. How do I apply for FACT FEDO Engineering Recruitment 2026 (Notification 01/2026)?
faq.answer: Candidates must first submit the online form through the official FACT website under Careers >> Job Openings >> Recruitment Notification 01/2026 and upload the duly filled and signed prescribed application form in PDF format, and then send the original application form along with self‑attested copies of all required certificates by Speed Post/Registered Post so as to reach the HR Department, FEDO Building, FACT, Udyogamandal, Kerala, on or before 28 May 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is the FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026 on permanent or temporary basis?
faq.answer: All the notified positions under FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026 are purely on temporary contract basis for a period of one year or till completion of the project, whichever is earlier, and the engagement does not confer any right to permanent employment or preference in future regular recruitment, although renewal may be considered at the management’s discretion based on requirements and performance.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF and application form?
faq.answer: The detailed Notification No. 01/2026, along with the prescribed application form and online registration link, is available on the official FACT website under the Careers → Job Openings section, and candidates should download and read the notification carefully before applying.
